content.en:
"Hahaha, this harvest is too big!!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

Three bone king's bone beads, one hundred and twenty-three bone general bone beads.

What kind of concept is this, which is equivalent to him killing three top ancestors and more than a hundred elite ancestors this time.

At least on the surface, there were no more than a hundred elite ancestors, at most no more than ten elite ancestors.

I have to say that the Bone Clan is extremely powerful, and this loss can't shake the foundation of the Bone Clan, but for him, it is a major gain.

Once he had refined so many bone beads, his strength could definitely be raised to the extreme of a top ancestor.

And his top ancestor is extreme, I am afraid that it is comparable to the average supreme ancestor.

"Refining!"

The bone beads were absorbed and refined by Ye Tian, refining the body, strengthening the power of the ancestors, and constantly improving their cultivation and strength.

In the blink of an eye, 100 million years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already finished refining all the more than a hundred bone beads, and it was already difficult to improve his strength.

"There are still two Bone King Bone Beads, continue refining!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Rumble!!!!

The energy of the Bone King's bone beads poured into Ye Tian's body, frantically refining Ye Tian's ancestor body.

Under such circumstances, Ye Tian began to improve again, but the speed of progress was still slow.

Ye Tian knew very well that his strength had reached the extreme of the top ancestor, and even if he refined these two Bone King Bone Beads, it would be difficult to increase his strength much.

In the blink of an eye, tens of millions of years have passed.

Ye Tian had already completely refined these two Bone King Bone Beads, but his cultivation could no longer make any progress, and his combat power had reached an extreme.

"Can't make any progress!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Even if he got more Bone King Bone Beads, he wouldn't be able to improve his strength.

Unless he can break this shackle and advance to the Supreme Ancestor level.

But he knew very well that the level of the top ancestor to the supreme ancestor was not something that could be crossed by cultivation and promotion, it must involve a certain secret, otherwise the dark forbidden domain would not be without rumors of the supreme ancestor.

Even the Realm Ancestors, these Ancestors, only knew that there were Ancient Ancestors who were sleeping, but those Ancient Ancestors were only in the top Ancestor Realm, and no Ancestor had ever stepped into the Supreme Ancestor level.

If there were really Supreme Ancestors, those Supreme Ancestors would have swept through the Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones.

Cultivation can't be improved, the ultimate ancestral skill is the ultimate of the ancestral skill, and he can't continue to improve, once the ultimate ancestral skill is created, it is the ultimate, and it is called the ultimate.

If his cultivation and ancestral skills can't be improved, he won't be able to improve his strength, and he won't even know how to improve his strength.

Even if copying talent is very good, but if you don't know how to improve your strength, you naturally can't improve.

"When I left the Ancient Sea Forbidden Land before, the Bone Clan sent a terrifying powerhouse, and that aura definitely surpassed the top ancestor, even the strongest ancestor may not be able to beat the other party, and the other party is definitely comparable to the top supreme ancestor. Therefore, the Bone Clan must know how to break the secret of the Supreme Ancestor!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But will the Bone Clan tell him this secret?

Abrupt.

Ye Tian took out a bone sword.

This bone sword is the strongest emperor weapon of the bone clan, and he has refined it, but he can't exert the power of the bone sword.

After all, this is the bone sword of the bone clan, not for him.

But for the Bone Clan, the value of this Supreme Emperor Weapon is definitely very high, maybe he can use this Supreme Emperor Weapon in exchange for the secret of impacting the Supreme Ancestor.

Ye Tian didn't take this imperial weapon with him, and directly let the copy body go to the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

Even if this copy body fell in the Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones, at least the Supreme Emperor Weapon was not lost, and he still had the capital to negotiate.

......

Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones.

Ye Tian stepped here, and immediately attracted the attention of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land Bone Kings.

This moment.

The Bone Kings did not attack Ye Tian, and the other bone generals and bone soldiers all came to the center of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

At the same time, one formation after another floated, protecting the center of the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

Obviously, they didn't dare to make a move with Ye Tian to prevent too many clansmen from falling.

Ye Tian went deep into the forbidden land of the Sea of Bones and looked at a venerable bone king.

"I'm here to negotiate!"

Ye Tian said.

"Ancestor of the Dark Forbidden Realm, what are you going to negotiate?"

A bone king spoke.

The reason why he replied to Ye Tian was not that he really wanted to talk to Ye Tian, but that he was delaying time and waiting for a bone emperor to come.

"I want to trade with the Bone Clan, I will return your Bone Clan's Supreme Emperor Weapon, and you tell me how to step into the Supreme Ancestor level, how about it?"

Ye Tian said.

"Let's think about it!"

The Bone King replied.

But deep down, the Bone King sneered: "If you still want to break through to the Supreme Ancestor Realm, it's just a fantasy!"

The Xeon Emperor Weapon is indeed very precious, and the Bone Clan does not want to lose it, but it does not mean that the Bone Clan cannot snatch back the Xeon Emperor Weapon.

Once he waited for the Dark Forbidden Domain Tribulation to come, the Bone Emperor could enter the Dark Forbidden Domain, and he could easily suppress Ye Tian when the time came.

Even if Ye Tian's clone could be condensed again and again, but if the body fell, then he would definitely die.

At that time, Ye Tian's body would not be able to run.

Therefore, they only need to wait for some time, and there is no need to trade with Ye Tian at all.

But he wouldn't tell Ye Tian this.

"It's coming!"

One Bone King said excitedly in his heart.

Bang!!!!

A Bone Emperor descended, and his breath instantly blocked the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

At the same time, a Venerable Bone King made a move, trying to intercept Ye Tian and not allowing Ye Tian to escape from here.

However, Ye Tian was not ready to leave, his eyes were directly at this Bone Emperor.

Click!!!

A hundred-meter-tall Bone Emperor appeared in front of Ye Tian in a golden battle robe, exuding a terrifying aura on his body.

However, Ye Tian also felt the suppression of this Bone Emperor by this side of heaven and earth.

Obviously, this Bone Emperor was unable to exert his full strength in the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

"The Bone Sea Forbidden Land only allows the Bone King to move, and this Bone Emperor forcibly stepped into here, I'm afraid he has paid some price!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Rumble!!!!

This Bone Emperor made a move, and he didn't give Ye Tian a chance to negotiate at all.

However, the other party didn't seem to be ready to bombard Ye Tian, but wanted to capture Ye Tian.

After all, killing Ye Tian is just killing a clone, which is of little significance, if you capture Ye Tian, you may be able to use this clone to study some clone secrets or cast secret techniques to kill Ye Tian in the air.

I saw a bone finger penetrating it, and the power was several times more powerful than that supreme emperor weapon.

Moreover, there was more than one such attack, and the original Bone King could only urge the Supreme Emperor Weapon to attack once, so the gap between the two was too big.

Whoa!!!

The Ultimate Ancestral Technique of One Gate Defense was instantly deployed, and Ye Tian's strength was much stronger than before, so the power of the Ultimate Defense Ancestral Technique was naturally stronger.

Click!!!

Layers of defensive shields were pierced, but in the end, this Bone Emperor only pierced through thirteen layers of defensive shields, and he was powerless.

"Your Excellency, if you continue to attack, I will also be dispatched, and when the time comes, you will not be able to protect these bone generals and bone kings, and I am just a clone, but I am not afraid of death. Is it to negotiate, or to continue fighting?" Ye Tian said coldly.

This Bone Emperor stopped, looked directly at Ye Tian, and said: "You are very strong, your realm is only equivalent to the Bone King, but no Bone King can withstand my blow without being injured, your strength is not much worse than that of the Bone Emperor, and in terms of defense, it is comparable to some powerful Bone Emperors." "

"Thank you for the compliment!" Ye Tian smiled.

The Bone Emperor said in a deep voice, "What do you want to negotiate?"

"The Strongest Emperor Weapon is exchanged for the secret of impacting the Supreme Ancestor, our Dark Forbidden Domain's Supreme Ancestor is equivalent to your Bone Emperor, although the path taken is different, but there may be similarities in some places, so I want to know how to break the shackles!"

Ye Tian asked.

The Bone Emperor was silent and did not answer immediately.

"It's not enough, the Supreme Emperor Weapon is only in your hands temporarily, and when it comes to the day of the Great Tribulation, our clan will still have a way to retrieve it!"

Bone Emperor Road.

"Really?" Ye Tian sneered: "If I attack this Bone Sea Forbidden Land again and again, how many clansmen will your Bone Clan lose, unless you keep guarding here, once you leave, I will even do my best to destroy that Gate!"

As soon as he mentioned the door, the Bone Emperor's expression changed drastically, and his aura began to rage.

"How dare you !!"

The Bone Emperor was furious.

"If you don't agree to this deal, I dare!" Ye Tian said with a smile.
